name: Traditional Three Leg Floor Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) Black  - Threshold™
description:
Light up your home in traditional style with the Traditional Three-Leg Floor Lamp in Black (Includes LED Light Bulb) from Threshold™. This black floor lamp features three gold-tone legs and a drum-shape shade in a neutral color, and a black rod base to complement the classic look. Made with metal, this traditional floor lamp can be placed near a sofa, chair or any other seating ensemble for gorgeous lighting.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
